children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for the Program $700,000 for fiscal year 1995, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the four succeeding fiscal years.

children.heading: WERC program
children.label: b WERC program
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for the WERC program under such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1995 and each of the four succeeding fiscal years.section 7382e of this title
